steps.t: The Corsair seeking you is at the main gate of Calembel in Lamedon. You should answer the summons of the Corsair, and find out what he wants.
Jajax is at the gate of Calembel. You should speak with Jajax.
The site of Hebil's massacre is south-west of Calembel. You should go with Jajax to the site where Hebil slaughtered Jajax's men. <rgb=#FF0000>N…
